chunks.en: Good morning everyone, here's my quick standup update for today.
chunks.ja: みなさんおはようございます、今日の私の短いスタンドアップ報告です。

chunks.en: Yesterday I finished the login page and fixed two small bugs.
chunks.ja: 昨日はログインページを終わらせて、小さなバグを二つ直しました。

chunks.en: Today I plan to write tests for the new API code.
chunks.ja: 今日は新しいAPIコードのテストを書く予定です。

chunks.en: The main problem I'm stuck on is a slow database query.
chunks.ja: 今詰まっている一番の問題は、データベースの検索が遅いことです。

chunks.en: I might need some help from the backend team this afternoon.
chunks.ja: 今日の午後、バックエンドチームの助けが少し必要かもしれません。

chunks.en: Our standup usually takes about ten minutes, so let's keep going.
chunks.ja: 私たちのスタンドアップはだいたい10分くらいなので、続けましょう。

outline: Finished yesterday: login page and bug fixes

modelTalk.text:
Hi everyone. Here's my quick update for today.

Yesterday I finished the login page for our app. I fixed two small bugs too. I also wrote some tests, and they all passed. So that part feels done now.

Today I want to start the new search feature. First I'll plan the design. Then I'll write the main code. I hope to finish most of it by tonight.

But I'm stuck on one thing. My code can't connect to the database. I tried a few times, but I got the same error. Maybe someone can help me later.

Our standup is usually short. It only takes about ten minutes. Everyone talks for one or two minutes. That's quick and easy for me.

That's all from me. Thanks for listening, and let's have a good day.

chunks.en: In my standup update, yesterday I finished fixing the login bug on our mobile app.
chunks.ja: 私のスタンドアップ報告では、昨日モバイルアプリのログインのバグ修正を終わらせました。

chunks.en: Today I plan to write unit tests for the new payment API.
chunks.ja: 今日は新しい決済APIのユニットテストを書く予定です。

chunks.en: One problem I'm stuck on is a slow database query that keeps timing out.
chunks.ja: 詰まっている点は、タイムアウトし続ける遅いデータベースのクエリです。

chunks.en: So I'd like to ask Kenji for help with the query later today.
chunks.ja: なので今日この後、そのクエリについてケンジさんに助けを求めたいです。

chunks.en: Our standup usually takes about ten minutes, so I'll keep my update short.
chunks.ja: 私たちのスタンドアップはたいてい10分くらいなので、報告は短くまとめます。

outline: Point 2: the problem I'm stuck on + who to ask
Wrap-up: keep it short, standup is ~10 min

modelTalk.text: Hi everyone, here's my quick update for today. Yesterday I finished the login page, and I fixed two small bugs. I also wrote some tests, so that part feels solid now. Today I want to start the new search feature. I'll build the basic layout first, then connect it to the data. I think I can get most of it done by tonight. But I'm stuck on one thing. The search results load really slowly, and I don't know why yet. So I might ask for some help after this call. If anyone knows this part well, please ping me later. Our standup usually takes about ten minutes, sometimes a bit less. We keep it short and simple, which I really like. That's everything from me for now. Thanks for listening, and I'll share more updates tomorrow. Okay, back to work!
